name: Butterfinger Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs and melted butter. Press 2/3 of the mixture into the bottom of a 9 x 13 pan.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the instant vanilla pudding and butterscotch pudding mixes. Prepare them using only 2 cups of milk. Blend in the softened vanilla ice cream until smooth.
3. Pour the pudding mixture over the crumb layer in the pan.
4. Freeze the dessert until it is partly firm.
5. Remove from the freezer and cover with Cool Whip.
6. Crush the Frozen Butterfingers and mix them with the remaining 1/3 cup of cracker crumbs. Sprinkle this mixture on top of the Cool Whip.
7. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
